use_cases: Interactive product image zoom on hover with smooth spring physics
Image gallery cards with cursor-centered zoom effect for better detail viewing
Portfolio or showcase cards requiring interactive image exploration
ai_summary: An interactive card component featuring a smooth zoom-on-hover effect powered by Framer Motion's spring physics. The component tracks mouse position to dynamically set the transform-origin, creating a natural lens-like zoom effect centered on the cursor. Ideal for e-commerce product cards, media galleries, or any UI requiring enhanced image interaction with fluid animations.
